title: Bitcoin Completes Rare 'Cup and Handle' Pattern, Signaling Major Move
summary: Bitcoin has completed a multi-year 'cup and handle' chart pattern, which traders believe could signal a significant price surge. This pattern, often associated with large price movements, has gone unnoticed by many in the crypto community.
body:
Bitcoin has just completed a rare 'cup and handle' chart pattern, a technical formation that traders watch closely for potential big price moves. This pattern, which took years to form, includes a breakout and a perfect retest, confirming its structure.

The 'cup and handle' is a bullish pattern where the price forms a U-shaped bottom (the cup) followed by a smaller downward drift (the handle). According to a tweet by @BitcoinSapiens, this pattern is now complete, with the handle retest confirming the breakout. Historically, such patterns don't just lead to 20% moves—they often precede much larger surges, potentially hundreds of percent.

For everyday investors, this could mean that Bitcoin is setting up for a major rally. While past performance doesn't guarantee future results, such patterns have often preceded significant price increases. If this pattern plays out as some traders expect, it could be a good time to pay attention to Bitcoin's price movements.

What to watch next: Keep an eye on Bitcoin's price action in the coming weeks. If the pattern holds, we could see a significant upward move. However, always remember that crypto markets are volatile, and patterns don't always play out as expected. Stay informed and consider your risk tolerance before making any investment decisions.

This pattern took years to form and includes a breakout and retest. Historically, such patterns don't just move 20%—they can surge hundreds of percent.

If this plays out, Bitcoin could be setting up for a major rally. Keep an eye on price action, but remember: crypto is volatile. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-24-bitcoin-completes-rare-cup-and-handle-pattern-signaling-major-move
